# Tray

> Tray is a campus canteen ordering platform. Students order from any canteen on their campus, kitchens run live order queues, and admins track orders, revenue, and handovers in real time. One system, three roles, run from a single screen.

Tray is built first for colleges and campuses, and generalizes to any food court, canteen, or QSR (quick-service restaurant) outlet that needs ordering, live kitchen queues, and operational oversight in one place.

## What Tray does
- Students browse the canteens on their campus, place orders, pay, and track order status live.
- Kitchen staff receive orders in a live queue and manage preparation and handover.
- Campus admins see orders, revenue, and handovers across all canteens in real time.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://trayy.vercel.app/): Product overview — campus food, without the queue.
- [Get started](https://trayy.vercel.app/get-started): Guided setup for a campus or canteen.
- [Sign up](https://trayy.vercel.app/signup): Create an account.
- [Log in](https://trayy.vercel.app/login): Access your dashboard.
